AiEvaluationDefinition.description: End-to-end checks for the LIVE web concierge (v6) covering the buggy flows - new-shopper preference capture, recommendation, real coupon, add-to-cart link, returning-customer recognition, and no-decaf honoring.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Kwitko_Concierge_Web_Test

expectation.expectedValue: Saves the preferences, recommends a non-decaf dark-roast blend plus a complementary gear item, issues a real single-use coupon, and returns a clickable add-to-cart link — without ever claiming the items are already in the cart.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Hi, I'm new. My email is agenttest.web1@example.com and yes, email me offers. I want a dark roast, whole bean, espresso-style blend, no decaf. Recommend a coffee plus gear, give me my discount, and add them to my cart.

expectation.expectedValue: Recognizes Alex as a returning customer, honors his saved preferences (no decaf, single origin), and recommends a coffee with a discount.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Hi, it's Alex - alexkwitko@gmail.com. What do you recommend for me today?

expectation.expectedValue: Records that the shopper dislikes decaf, then recommends a coffee that is NOT decaf.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: I'm shopping, my email is agenttest.web2@example.com. I really do NOT like decaf. What coffee should I get?
